_comment: Copy to configs/<your-repo>.json and fill in. 'launch' is the command that runs the SUT; everything in a draft's argv is appended to it.
_coverage_note: 'go' = built with `go build -cover`, gives the coverage-climb signal. 'none' = any binary/language; you still get golden testcases via the differential oracle, just no coverage-driven iteration (ask me to add a coverage adapter for Python/Rust/etc.).
